title: Actuaries
description: Analyze statistical data, such as mortality, accident, sickness, disability, and retirement rates and construct probability tables to forecast risk and liability for payment of future benefits. May ascertain insurance rates required and cash reserves necessary to ensure payment of future benefits.

tasks.text: Ascertain premium rates required and cash reserves and liabilities necessary to ensure payment of future benefits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with programmers, underwriters, accounts, claims experts, and senior management to help companies develop plans for new lines of business or improvements to existing business.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze statistical information to estimate mortality, accident, sickness, disability, and retirement rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design, review, and help administer insurance, annuity and pension plans, determining financial soundness and calculating premiums.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine, or help determine, company policy, and explain complex technical matters to company executives, government officials, shareholders, policyholders, or the public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct probability tables for events such as fires, natural disasters, and unemployment, based on analysis of statistical data and other pertinent information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide advice to clients on a contract basis, working as a consultant.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine equitable basis for distributing surplus earnings under participating insurance and annuity contracts in mutual companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate terms and conditions of reinsurance with other companies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide expertise to help financial institutions manage risks and maximize returns associated with investment products or credit offerings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Testify before public agencies on proposed legislation affecting businesses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine policy contract provisions for each type of insurance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Testify in court as expert witness or to provide legal evidence on matters such as the value of potential lifetime earnings of a person disabled or killed in an accident.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain changes in contract provisions to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage credit and help price corporate security offerings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
